calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary O'Keeffe for Madelyn Davis (Executor).

Ms. O'Keeffe stated that she filed a supplement in response to the Probate Examiner's notes, that she believes they addressed all of the issues and that original copies of the death certificates were filed in person back in May. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
